pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE, which requires Java 11+ and changes many APIs.
Add explicit JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade Hibernate to 5.4.25.Final to match Spring Boot 2.3 dependencies and Java 11 compatibility.
Upgrade Liquibase to 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with the new Hibernate and Spring Boot versions.
Upgrade MapStruct to 1.4.1.Final to support newer Java features and annotation processing.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.8.1 to properly support Java 11 compilation features.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.0.0-M5 to support JUnit 5 and Java 11 test execution.
Upgrade Maven Failsafe Plugin to 3.0.0-M5 to support JUnit 5 and Java 11 integration test execution.
Upgrade Maven Enforcer Plugin to 3.0.0-M3 for better rule enforcement in modern builds.
Upgrade Maven Resources Plugin to 3.2.0 for improved resource filtering and encoding support.
Upgrade Maven Javadoc Plugin to 3.2.0 to support Java 11 documentation generation.
Upgrade Maven Clean Plugin to 3.1.0 for minor improvements and compatibility.
Upgrade Maven War Plugin to 3.3.1 for better WAR packaging support.
Upgrade Checkstyle to 8.38 to support Java 11 syntax checking.
Upgrade Maven Checkstyle Plugin to 3.1.1 for compatibility with newer Checkstyle versions.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 dependency for architectural testing in the new project structure.
Update Validation API to 2.0.1.Final to align with Jakarta EE / Java 11 standards.
Update Javassist to 3.27.0-GA to match Hibernate 5.4 requirements.
Update Liquibase Hibernate 5 module to 4.2.2 to match the new Liquibase version.
Change project packaging from WAR to JAR, reflecting a shift to executable JAR deployment common in Spring Boot 2.x.
Update groupId to io.github.jhipster.sample to reflect the new project identity.
Update artifactId to jhipster-oauth-2-sample-application to reflect the new project identity.
Add Node.js and NPM version properties for frontend build consistency.
Add argLine property to configure JVM arguments for tests, including entropy source and memory limits.
Add m2e.apt.activation property to configure Eclipse annotation processing.
Add empty profile properties for no-liquibase, api-docs, and tls to support conditional build profiles.
Add JHipster dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions consistently.
Update Maven version property to 3.3.9 to reflect minimum required Maven version.
Add explicit source and reporting encoding properties to ensure UTF-8 consistency.
Add test result directory property to standardize test output location.
Add Maven build timestamp format property for consistent timestamp generation.
Add empty repositories section with JHipster needle for future repository additions.
Add empty pluginRepositories section with JHipster needle for future plugin repository additions.
Add comment placeholder for distribution management configuration.
Update Maven POM XSD schema location to use HTTPS for security.
Remove SonarQube specific properties as they are likely managed differently in the new setup.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed sonar-maven-plugin.version, jacoco-maven-plugin.version, and various sonar.* properties

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove old dependency version properties that are no longer needed or managed by BOMs.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed HikariCP.version, assertj-core.version, awaitility.version, commons-io.version, etc.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove old plugin version properties that are replaced by newer versions or managed by BOMs.
Remove the prerequisites section as Maven version requirements are now handled differently.
Remove the Spring Boot starter parent POM in favor of explicit dependency management via BOMs.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganized .editorconfig to apply specific indentation rules to frontend and config file types instead of a global default.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent_style and indent_size into a specific glob pattern [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] with indent_size = 2, removing the previous global indent_size = 4.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple wildcard rules with detailed lists for text, binary, documents, graphics, configs, and media files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the generated main CSS file to prevent committing build artifacts.
Ignore static resources copied to the target classes directory during build.
Ignore JavaScript test coverage reports generated by the build process.
Ignore Node.js temporary directories and debug logs.
Ignore Webpack and loader cache directories to keep the repository clean.
Ignore Spring Tool Suite 4 specific cache directories.
Ignore IntelliJ IDEA compiled output directories.
Ignore Visual Studio Code configuration and workspace files.
Ignore the Gradle build output directory.
Ensure the Maven Wrapper JAR is tracked by negating the ignore rule.
Ignore the ESLint cache file to improve linting performance.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Remove the explicit javaVersion configuration as JHipster 7 defaults to Java 11 and no longer requires this field for standard setups.
Convert string-based boolean configurations to native JSON booleans for consistency with newer JHipster versions.
Update the base name and package structure to reflect the new sample application identity.
Add explicit frontend configuration fields required by the newer JHipster generator version.
Add explicit build and server configuration fields required by the newer JHipster generator version.

package.json.general_idea: Update package name, version, and description to reflect the new application identity.
Add license field to package.json metadata.
Add comprehensive npm scripts for backend testing, CI/CD, and Docker management.
Add configuration variables for backend port, environment, and packaging type.
Add Angular framework core dependencies for the frontend application.
Add Angular UI component libraries and styling dependencies.
Add Angular utility libraries for localization, translation, and state management.
Add runtime utility libraries for icons, date handling, and web storage.
Add Angular build tools and custom webpack builders for development.
Add Jest testing framework and Angular builders for testing.
Remove legacy Grunt build tool and its plugins.
Remove legacy Karma test runner and its launchers/preprocessors.
Remove the JHipster generator dependency from devDependencies.
Remove miscellaneous legacy dependencies like lodash, xml2js, and yo.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the embedded H2 database identifier to match the specific application name.
src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.human_impl: Changed 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' and 'mem:jhipster' to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' and 'mem:jhipsteroauth2sampleapplication'.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Allow remote access to the H2 web console by enabling 'webAllowOthers'.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for cache, CORS, mail, and logging to align with the framework's standard structure.
Switch from generic DataSourceClassName to HikariDataSource and update H2 connection parameters for better performance and compatibility.
Update the JPA database platform property to use the JHipster-specific FixedH2Dialect for H2 compatibility.
Configure Spring Boot DevTools for automatic restart and livereload exclusion to improve developer experience.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl:
spring:
  devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-exclude: static/**,.h2.server.properties

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Define explicit logging levels for root, JHipster, Hibernate, and application packages to facilitate debugging in the dev profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Include the api-docs profile in the active profiles to enable Swagger/OpenAPI documentation generation.
Update Liquibase contexts to include 'faker' for loading sample data automatically in the dev environment.
Configure local mail server properties for development testing.
Enable indented output for Jackson serialization to improve readability of JSON responses in development.
Disable Thymeleaf template caching to ensure changes are reflected immediately during development.
Configure message cache duration using ISO 8601 format for better standardization.
Explicitly disable the H2 console in the dev profile configuration.
Configure CORS settings to allow all origins, methods, and headers for development convenience.
Add configuration for forwarding logs to Logstash, disabled by default in dev.
Disable JSON format for logs in the dev profile for better human readability.
Set the base URL for mail links in the JHipster mail configuration.
Add a placeholder section for application-specific properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Switched from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool for better performance and compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.type to com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource and removed dataSourceClassName.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Updated MySQL JDBC URL to include timezone and SSL settings required for newer MySQL drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added useSSL=false, useLegacyDatetimeCode=false, serverTimezone=UTC to the JDBC URL.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Removed explicit Hibernate dialect configuration, relying on auto-detection or newer default dialects.
Removed deprecated EJB3NamingStrategy in favor of default Hibernate 5+ naming strategies.
Updated Ehcache region factory class to match newer Hibernate/Ehcache integration standards.
Replaced legacy Dropwizard metrics configuration with Spring Boot Actuator Micrometer configuration.
Standardized logging levels using Spring Boot's native logging configuration structure.
Enabled HTTP response compression for improved performance in production.
Configured graceful shutdown to allow in-flight requests to complete during server stop.
Migrated JHipster-specific configuration from root level to the jhipster namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Moved http.cache, cache.ehcache, and mail properties under jhipster: prefix.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Explicitly disabled Spring Boot DevTools in production profile to prevent accidental activation.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added spring.devtools.restart.enabled: false and spring.devtools.livereload.enabled: false.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Removed explicit XHTML mode for Thymeleaf, defaulting to HTML5 mode.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Update async task configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task` namespace instead of custom `async` properties.
Move mail configuration from custom `mail` namespace to standard `spring.mail` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced `mail.host` with `spring.mail.host` (implied by structure change, though specific values moved to profile-specific files in typical JHipster, here the structure is updated).

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace legacy JHipster security properties with Spring Security 5.x OAuth2 client configuration.
Update Swagger documentation properties to align with newer SpringFox/SpringDoc conventions used in JHipster 6+.
Add standard Spring Data JPA and Hibernate configuration properties required for Spring Boot 2.x compatibility.
Configure Micrometer metrics export and health probes for Spring Boot 2.x actuator.
Add server servlet session cookie configuration for security hardening.
